name: Piquant Sour Orange Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Juice & pulp of sour oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Pour the marinade over pork, venison, or poultry.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 12-24 hours.
4. When cooking the meat, use the remaining marinade as a basting sauce.
